title: Baharly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baharly with a Z-Score of +3.46. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baharly is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, making the air feel even hotter. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 4.5 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
